response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, polyglot full-stack engineer with 17+ years of hands-on experience and recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure, but the profile falls well short of a director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. The role demands recognized AI expertise with demonstrated platforms built at scale, strategic customer advisory experience, and thought leadership in cloud and AI — none of which are evidenced at the required level. AI involvement only began in April 2025, there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and the resume shows no history of advising enterprise customers, influencing product roadmaps at a strategic level, or building AI products with measurable industry impact.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq, showing awareness of the agentic AI space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct via GISCollective (founded 2016, still active), open-source library authorship, and community workshops/talks
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — meaningful AI work only started in April 2025, with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized contributions prior to that
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; the role strongly prefers advanced academic credentials in AI and the resume holds only two undergraduate degrees

No evidence of director-level strategic advisory responsibilities, enterprise customer engagement, or the kind of external thought leadership (publications, keynotes, industry recognition) expected at this seniority

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
